pr.title: Record: 0.4027 BPB — Swarm-Designed Causal BackoffNgramMixer (3-seed mean, std 0.0015)

output.summary: Swarm-selected 11L transformer blends entropy-driven neural and 2–10 order BackoffNgramMixer probabilities while causal chunk eval lets every rank build full n-gram stats.
techniques: Entropy-adaptive mixture of neural logits with BackoffNgramMixer orders 2‑10
Strict causal chunk scoring that updates n-gram counts only after scoring each chunk
Parallel Muon + LeakyReLU² base with KG-informed initialization
